subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Christ said that nothing could ascend into Heaven except that which came down from Heaven. He also said, 'I came from Heaven and will return to Heaven,'
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @suffering; rejection of Christ
